description: Bug that blocks the release. type=bug, priority=p0 (critical), effort=m.

issue.title: [Bug] Desktop app crashes on startup on macOS 14.4 (Sonoma)
issue.body:
## Steps to reproduce

1. Install latest desktop build on macOS 14.4.
2. Launch the app.
3. Crash within 500ms.

## Stack trace

```
process exited with code 134 (SIGABRT)
panic: abort called
Electron 35.0.0
darwin 23.4.0 arm64
```

Reported by 3 users in #support this morning.
